title: ML coding consolidation + design pattern review
focus: Re-implement one classifier with a clean OO API. Reflect on SOLID violations.

items.label: Trapping Rain Water
interviewQuestions: Compare DP (precompute left-max, right-max) vs two-pointer O(1) space — walk through the two-pointer invariant.
What if rainwater can flow off the sides — how does that change anything?

items.label: Code k-NN classifier from scratch
interviewQuestions: Implement k-NN from scratch and explain its time/space complexity.
How would you speed up k-NN inference on millions of points without changing the prediction?

items.label: Code k-means from scratch
interviewQuestions: Why does k-means++ initialization matter, and what does it cost vs random init?

items.label: Code logistic regression with SGD
interviewQuestions: Implement logistic regression with mini-batch SGD and L2 regularization.
What numerical-stability pitfalls do you watch out for when implementing the sigmoid + log-loss?

items.label: Code linear regression training from scratch
interviewQuestions: Implement linear regression training with vectorized gradients and a learning-rate parameter.
How do you verify your from-scratch implementation against sklearn or a closed-form OLS solution?

items.label: Creational: factory, builder, singleton
interviewQuestions: When is a singleton an anti-pattern in tests?
Compare factory vs abstract factory vs builder.

items.label: Structural: adapter, decorator, facade
interviewQuestions: When would you reach for an adapter vs a facade?
Where does the decorator pattern show up cleanly in an ML inference pipeline?

items.label: Behavioral: strategy, observer, command
interviewQuestions: Show how the strategy pattern lets you swap ML models without touching call sites.
When does observer cause subtle bugs in a high-throughput system?
